case_title: RHODES, JESSICA vs. BELLI, BELLI, BROWN, MONZIONE, FABRO & ZAKARIA,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT BELLI, BELLI, BROWN, MONZIONE, FABRO & ZAKARIA, A PARTNERSHIP; MELVIN BELLI, SR., IND; MELVIN     BELLI, JR., IND; RICHARD BROWN, IND; PAUL M       MONZIONE, IND; SHAMON ZAKARIA, IND
